steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage says people socializing at the general store would “share news and help spread it throughout their communities.” The blank fills “the store was a ______ of information.” The word must mean an origin point — a place from which information flows.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "source": “Source” means a place where something originates or is obtained. The store is precisely where information originates and spreads outward. ✓
  • "rival": “Rival” means competitor. The passage never frames the store as competing with anything. ✗
  • "condition": “Condition” means state or requirement. Saying the store was a “condition of information” is not meaningful in context. ✗
  • "waste": “Waste” means something discarded or spent unnecessarily — the opposite of what the passage describes. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
